falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom was followed by a grinding recovery, not a V-shape reversal exceeding prior highs; a close above 5,600 would indicate this is not that pattern and likely a false breakdown or different regime entirely

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 15.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 41 implies elevated stress/forced selling; sustained VIX compression below 15 would prove stress has dissipated without the expected capitulation, invalidating the bottom call and suggesting the pattern was a head-fake

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX simultaneously trades below 5,200
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a flight-to-safety recession bid in bonds with no equity bounce, proving the current setup is not a market bottom but rather the start of a sustained bear market where rates and equities fall together, breaking the bottom_2024_aug pattern which featured rate stability/rise during equity stabilization

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
